case_title: JIMMIE OLIVER ET AL VS. AUTO TOWING (LLC)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-13-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF JIMMIE OLIVER CONTACTED DEPT. 506 CLERK BY PHONE FEW MINUTES BEFORE COURT THAT HE CANNOT APPEAR ON TODAY'S HEARING DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTING COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
